columns.extraction_plan: The "Type of Therapy" is described throughout the text. The study compares "ADT (androgen-deprivation therapy) in combination with docetaxel" versus "ADT alone" for metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer (mHSPC). The specific docetaxel regimen (75 mg/m^2 every 3 weeks for up to six cycles) is also mentioned in the abstract and methods section.
